query:
SELECT p.id, p.name, p.productLane, p.projectState, p.sector, p.stageCode, p.value, p.priority,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN c.contactTrustTier = 'send_ready' AND c.crmOrphan = 0 AND c.rejectedAt IS NULL THEN 1 END) as sr_count
FROM projects p
LEFT JOIN contactProjects cp ON cp.projectId = p.id
LEFT JOIN contacts c ON c.id = cp.contactId
WHERE p.suppressed = 0
  AND p.priority IN ('hot', 'warm')
  AND p.geoBlockedReason IS NULL
  AND (p.productLane IS NULL OR p.productLane NOT IN ('bess', 'pal', 'pumps'))
  AND (p.projectState IN ('NSW','VIC','SA','TAS') OR p.projectState IS NULL)
  AND p.sector = 'oil_gas'
  AND p.id NOT IN ('690089','570022','330035','210007','330033','660020','330017','120346','120267','210028')
GROUP BY p.id, p.name, p.productLane, p.projectState, p.sector, p.stageCode, p.value, p.priority
HAVING sr_count >= 1
ORDER BY sr_count DESC
LIMIT 10;

SELECT p.id, p.name, p.productLane, p.projectState, p.sector, p.stageCode, p.value, p.priority,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN c.contactTrustTier = 'send_ready' AND c.crmOrphan = 0 AND c.rejectedAt IS NULL THEN 1 END) as sr_count
FROM projects p
LEFT JOIN contactProjects cp ON cp.projectId = p.id
LEFT JOIN contacts c ON c.id = cp.contactId
WHERE p.suppressed = 0
  AND p.priority IN ('hot', 'warm')
  AND p.geoBlockedReason IS NULL
  AND (p.productLane IS NULL OR p.productLane NOT IN ('bess', 'pal', 'pumps'))
  AND (p.projectState IN ('NSW','VIC','SA','TAS') OR p.projectState IS NULL)
  AND p.sector = 'oil_gas'
  AND p.id NOT IN ('690089','570022','330035','210007','330033','660020','330017','120346','120267','210028')
GROUP BY p.id, p.name, p.productLane, p.projectState, p.sector, p.stageCode, p.value, p.priority
HAVING sr_count >= 1
ORDER BY sr_count DESC
LIMIT 10;
